source_jobs.title: Head of Sales - East Coast
source_jobs.description:
WHAT WE ARE BUILDING AT CONVEO

Conveo is the AI research platform enabling fast, affordable, and high-quality consumer / B2B research. Global brands like Unilever, Google, and Orange use our AI video interviewer to generate insights across marketing and product teams.




#1 WHAT PROBLEM ARE WE SOLVING, AND WHY IS THIS AN IMPORTANT PROBLEM TO SOLVE

The current/traditional research methods companies rely on are slow, expensive, and superficial. Running great research also requires expertise, which is a blocker to many companies. That directly affects how well companies understand their customers and how well they can serve them.




#2 THE TEAM YOU WILL JOIN

You will join an extremely talented team of incredibly passionate, high-energy people. We go the extra mile while having the best time of our lives. Our team has the combination of decades of market research knowledge, incredible engineering ability, and experience building companies.




#3 HOW WE OPERATE

 - We truly care about our clients and the problem we solve. That means we humbly go the extra mile every time.

 - We work hard, and we have fun.

 - To keep our quality bar incredibly high, we want to execute with the smallest possible team.




THE ROLE

We're looking for a highly driven Head of Sales to help scale revenue at Conveo by leading from the front.

This is a player coach role. You will lead our East Coast team of ~5 Account Executives while carrying your own individual quota. You'll be responsible for the performance, development, and commercial output of the team, and at the same time you'll be running your own strategic deals and showing the team what great looks like in practice.

You will report directly to the Global VP of Sales and work closely with marketing, BDR, and customer success to ensure the team is converting pipeline efficiently, executing consistently, and landing the kind of customers that compound our growth.

This is not a role for someone who wants to step back from selling. The best person for this job loves closing deals, loves coaching reps, and refuses to choose between the two.




YOUR MISSION


1. LEAD A HIGH-PERFORMING TEAM OF 5 ACCOUNT EXECUTIVES

 - Own the performance, quota attainment, and development of ~5 AEs

 - Run a high quality weekly operating cadence including 1:1s, pipeline reviews, forecast calls, and deal reviews

 - Coach reps on discovery, qualification, multi threading, commercial framing, negotiation, and closing

 - Set a high bar for activity, preparation, and commercial discipline across the team

 - Identify performance gaps quickly and act on them with clear feedback and concrete plans

 - Help recruit, onboard, and ramp new AEs as the team grows
   
   


2. CARRY AND DELIVER YOUR OWN INDIVIDUAL QUOTA

 - Own and close a portfolio of strategic accounts alongside your management responsibilities

 - Run full cycle sales from discovery through to commercial close on enterprise opportunities

 - Use your own deals to model best practice for the team rather than managing from the sideline

 - Stay close to the product, the market, and the buyer so your instincts and the team's stay sharp
   
   


3. DRIVE FORECAST ACCURACY AND COMMERCIAL DISCIPLINE

 - Own the team's forecast and be accountable for its accuracy to the VP of Sales

 - Inspect pipeline rigorously and make sure deals are qualified, multi-threaded, and progressing

 - Hold the team to a clear standard on CRM hygiene, MEDDICC (or equivalent), and deal documentation

 - Surface risk early and intervene on critical deals before they slip
   
   


4. IMPROVE HOW THE TEAM SELLS

 - Identify what is and isn't working in the team's motion and fix it quickly

 - Refine playbooks, talk tracks, objection handling, and competitive positioning with the team

 - Partner with marketing and BDR to make sure pipeline coverage and quality are where they need to be

 - Feed insights from the field back into product, pricing, and packaging conversations

source_jobs.title: Executive Assistant & Office Manager
source_jobs.description:
WHAT WE ARE BUILDING AT CONVEO

Conveo is the AI research platform enabling fast, affordable, and high-quality consumer / B2B research. Global brands like Unilever, Google, and Orange use our AI video interviewer to generate insights across marketing and product teams.



#1 WHAT PROBLEM ARE WE SOLVING, AND WHY IS THIS AN IMPORTANT PROBLEM TO SOLVE

The current/traditional research methods companies rely on are slow, expensive, and superficial. Running great research also requires expertise, which is a blocker to many companies. That directly affects how well companies understand their customers and how well they can serve them. Conveo is the platform that closes this gap by enabling affordable, scaled, and deep insights in days instead of weeks.



#2 THE TEAM YOU WILL JOIN

You will join an extremely talented team of incredibly passionate, high-energy people. We go the extra mile while having the best time of our lives. Our team has the combination of decades of market research knowledge, incredible engineering ability, and experience building companies.



#3 HOW WE OPERATE

 - We truly care about our clients and the problem we solve. That means we humbly go the extra mile every time.

 - We work hard, and we have fun.

 - To keep our quality bar incredibly high, we want to execute with the smallest possible team.


THE ROLE



YOUR IMPACT

As our first Executive Assistant & Office Manager, you’ll be a creative problem-solver and trusted partner to the leadership team. Your day-to-day focus will be partnering closely with our founders — Dieter (CEO) and Hendrik (CRO) — while supporting the broader leadership team as needed.

You’ll help optimize how the company spends its time and attention — bringing clarity, calm, and momentum to a fast-moving environment.

You’ll build strong, trust-based relationships across the company and with external stakeholders (candidates, customers, investors, partners, and vendors). You’ll act as an informed representative in day-to-day interactions, with great judgment and total discretion.

This is a role for someone who enjoys owning the details and improving the system: creating high-quality outputs, anticipating what’s needed next, and making sure the team can stay focused on building, selling, and shipping.




YOUR MISSION



MAKE LEADERSHIP TIME WORK FOR THE WHOLE COMPANY

Your primary day-to-day support is for the founders — Dieter (CEO) and Hendrik (CRO). You own the calendar mechanics, inbox triage, prep, and follow-through that keep decisions crisp and execution unblocked.

 - Own and protect leadership calendars: protect deep work, batch shallow work, eliminate meetings that shouldn’t happen, and make sure the meetings that do happen have an agenda, a prep doc, and a clear outcome

 - Triage inboxes: surface what truly needs attention, draft replies when appropriate, and make sure nothing important falls through the cracks

 - Track action items from leadership meetings and make sure they close
   


RUN THE OFFICE SO NO ONE NOTICES THE OFFICE

The best office management is invisible. Coffee is good, the wifi works, the new hire has a laptop on day one, and Friday lunch shows up without anyone asking.

 - Own the Antwerp / London office end-to-end: vendors, suppliers, snacks, equipment, etc.

 - Set up and equip the office, including any future moves or expansions

 - Be the first point of contact for visitors, candidates on-site, customers stopping by, and the team itself when something needs sorting
   


MAKE TRAVEL, OFFSITES, AND VISITS ACTUALLY WORK

We run quarterly team offsites and travel constantly between London, Antwerp, and New York. You make all of that frictionless.

 - Plan and book founder and leadership travel: flights, hotels, ground transport, dinners, visa logistics

 - Own quarterly team offsites end-to-end: venue, agenda support, travel, food, activities, budget

 - Coordinate customer visits, investor visits, and recruiting on-site days
   


BUILD THE CULTUR

source_jobs.title: Design Lead
source_jobs.description:
WHAT WE ARE BUILDING AT CONVEO

Conveo is the AI research platform enabling fast, affordable, and high-quality consumer / B2B research. Global brands like Unilever, Google, and Orange use our AI video interviewer to generate insights across marketing and product teams.



WHAT PROBLEM ARE WE SOLVING, AND WHY IS THIS AN IMPORTANT PROBLEM TO SOLVE

The current/traditional research methods companies rely on are slow, expensive, and superficial. Running great research also requires expertise, which is a blocker to many companies. That directly affects how well companies understand their customers and how well they can serve them.



THE TEAM YOU WILL JOIN

You will join an extremely talented team of incredibly passionate, high-energy people. We go the extra mile while having the best time of our lives. Our team has the combination of decades of market research knowledge, incredible engineering ability, and experience building companies.



HOW WE OPERATE

 - We truly care about our clients and the problem we solve. That means we humbly go the extra mile every time.

 - We work hard, and we have fun.

 - To keep our quality bar incredibly high, we want to execute with the smallest possible team.


THE ROLE

You will own how marketing design works at Conveo. You design the templates, set the standards, approve assets, and run the day-to-day. You support our Creative Director in defining our visual brand, and then turn that into a system the rest of the company can use.

We have a foundation of assets: decks, ads, social, website. We don’t have good templates or processes to scale those assets. Your job is to take what exists, keep what's worth keeping, and build what we need to take all our assets to the next level.

This is a role for someone who's built before. You've designed templates that the rest of the company actually adopted. You've used AI to ship at volume without dropping the bar. You've worked with opinionated founders and fast paced teams. And you've held the standard without losing the relationships. You have taste, and you have spine.

If you want to be the person who turns Conveo's brand into a real, scalable system, this is the role.



YOUR MISSION



1. BUILD THE DESIGN SYSTEM FOUNDATIONS

 - Establish the scalable design system across Figma, decks, and web (components, templates, tokens, guidelines)

 - Shape brand strategy alongside our Creative Director, founders, and agency, and then translate it into how design works day-to-day

 - Make it easy for the whole company to stay on-brand without Design becoming a bottleneck


2. OWN RECURRING DESIGN OUTPUT

 - Ship a wide variety of assets, including sales decks, investor decks, ad creative, website pages, social images, event collateral, and merch

 - Produce data visualizations, infographics, product mockups, and long-form content imagery (for whitepapers, guides, one-pagers, reports)

 - Continuously raise the quality bar on the assets we ship most often

 - Create templates, AI skills, and processes to allow team members to self-serve more and make Design scalable


3. RUN DESIGN OPS AND TRIAGE

 - Be the first stop for all incoming design requests across the company

 - Scope, prioritize, and route work across resources, including internal designers, agencies, and freelancers

 - Manage feedback loops, deadlines, and stakeholder communication so projects ship cleanly



WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR

 - 6+ years of design experience with strong B2B / SaaS exposure and a portfolio that proves both volume and craft

 - Demonstrable track record of building scalable design systems, templates, AI workflows, and reusable components that other teams actually adopted

 - Excellent presentation design skills across sales decks and investor decks

 - Experience working across a wide range of design assets

 - Brings structure and rigor to creative work. You ship on time, communicate proactively, and don't let chaos compound.

 - Strong collaborator who is a true partner to

source_jobs.title: Head of Partnerships
source_jobs.description:
WHAT WE ARE BUILDING AT CONVEO

Conveo is the AI research platform enabling fast, affordable, and high-quality consumer / B2B research. Global brands like Unilever, Google, and Orange use our AI video interviewer to generate insights across marketing and product teams.




#1 WHAT PROBLEM ARE WE SOLVING, AND WHY IS THIS AN IMPORTANT PROBLEM TO SOLVE

The current/traditional research methods companies rely on are slow, expensive, and superficial. Running great research also requires expertise, which is a blocker to many companies. That directly affects how well companies understand their customers and how well they can serve them. Conveo is the platform that closes this gap by enabling affordable, scaled, and deep insights in days instead of weeks.





#2 THE TEAM YOU WILL JOIN

You will join an extremely talented team of incredibly passionate, high-energy people. We go the extra mile while having the best time of our lives. Our team has the combination of decades of market research knowledge, incredible engineering ability, and experience building companies.





#3 HOW WE OPERATE

 - We truly care about our clients and the problem we solve. That means we humbly go the extra mile every time.

 - We work hard, and we have fun.

 - To keep our quality bar incredibly high, we want to execute with the smallest possible team.




THE ROLE

Partnerships at Conveo is nascent today — but it will become one of our core revenue drivers. We need a senior leader to build this function from zero and scale it into a machine.

This is not a relationship management role. This is a build role with commercial teeth. You'll define the strategy, structure the economics, close the deals, and create a partner program that compounds. The scope spans panels, research agencies, consulting firms, system integrators, and product companies looking to integrate Conveo's capabilities into their own offerings.

We already have early partnerships generating revenue. Your job is to take what's working and build a scalable, world-class partnerships organization around it.




YOUR MISSION

 1. Build the partnerships function from the ground up — strategy, partner types, deal structures, and go-to-market motions

 2. Actively source and close partnership deals across panels, agencies, consultancies, SI firms, and product integrations

 3. Structure the economics — referral fees, reseller models, co-selling motions, and revenue shares

 4. Train partner teams on Conveo so they can sell and deliver effectively

 5. Work with our sales team to embed partners into enterprise deals

 6. Drive product integration partnerships that extend Conveo's reach

 7. Build a partner program that scales — onboarding, enablement, quality standards, and joint marketing




WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR

 - 20+ years of experience and credibility in research, insights, or enterprise SaaS

 - A commercial and sales background — you know how to structure and close deals

 - Deep knowledge of the research and insights landscape — agencies, panels, consultancies, SI firms

 - A builder mentality — you're energized by creating something from nothing, not managing what exists

 - A network that opens doors — and the ability to walk through them and close

 - Someone who can sell TO partners and THROUGH partners with equal skill




LOCATION

New York or San Francisco. Significant travel expected.




WHY JOIN US

At Conveo, you'll join a team that genuinely enjoys working and spending time together. We care about building real relationships, not just great products. That's why we run quarterly team off-sites where we disconnect, reset, and have fun.

 - Own a high-impact role at a hyper-growth, YC-backed AI company

 - Direct access to founders and senior leadership

 - Work with world-class enterprise clients (Unilever, Google, P&G, Canva, and more)

 - Competitive compensation, including meaningful equity (stock options) with real upside

 - Hybrid working model with offices in London, Antw

source_jobs.title: Events Marketing Manager
source_jobs.description:
WHAT WE'RE BUILDING AT CONVEO

Conveo is the AI research platform enabling fast, affordable, and high quality consumer and B2B research. Global brands like Unilever, Google, and Orange use our AI video interviewer to generate insights across marketing, product, and research teams.



THE CONTEXT

Our events engine is firing. US in-person events are generating 20+ meetings per conference. The calendar is growing fast across both Americas and EMEA. We now have dedicated on-the-ground execution for physical events in the US.

What we don't have yet is someone who owns the virtual channel with the same intensity.

Webinars and virtual roundtables are one of the highest-leverage tools in B2B marketing: they scale reach, deepen relationships with enterprise prospects, and keep Conveo top of mind between in-person moments. We've proven the in-person engine works. Now we want to build the virtual one to match.

Our Events Lead (@Julia Sirotina) runs the global events operation: strategy, commercial roadmap, reporting, and the EMEA calendar. This role reports directly to her. You'll own 80% of your time on virtual: designing, building, and running a world-class webinar and virtual events programme from scratch. The other 20% is supporting the global events function on smaller, high-touch client experiences: roundtable dinners, executive roundtables, and intimate activations that deepen relationships with our most important accounts.

This is a builder role. The strategic direction exists. Your job is to own the virtual channel and take it from zero to excellent.



YOUR MISSION



1. BUILD AND RUN CONVEO'S WEBINAR PROGRAMME

This is the core of the role. You build it, you own it, you make it excellent.

 - Design the webinar calendar from scratch: topics, formats, frequency, and target audiences aligned to our pipeline priorities

 - End-to-end production: speaker sourcing and briefing, content development, Zoom setup, run-of-show, and post-event follow-ups

 - Partner with Marketing to integrate webinars into nurture sequences, campaign calendars, and content repurposing workflows

 - Partner with Sales to surface the right accounts and contacts for each event and ensure every attendee gets a quality follow-up

 - Manage Conveo's sponsored virtual events: brief the organisers, prepare the team, ensure leads are captured and attributed correctly, and report on ROI to the same standard as owned events

 - Build a library of repeatable playbooks, templates, and run-of-show guides so the programme scales without quality loss

 - Continuously improve: track what drives registrations, attendance, and pipeline, and evolve the format based on what works


2. RUN INTIMATE CLIENT EVENTS THAT DEEPEN ENTERPRISE RELATIONSHIPS

The 20% is not an afterthought. Roundtable dinners and executive events are where our most valuable relationships are built.

 - Support the global events team on planning and delivery of roundtable dinners, executive breakfasts, and small-group activations

 - Take ownership of specific events from brief to close: venue coordination, invitation management, speaker prep, and on-the-night execution

 - Ensure these events are consistent with global brand standards and feed into the same lead capture and follow-up workflows as the broader events programme

 - Bring a hospitality-level mindset: the details matter, the atmosphere matters, and the follow-through always matters


3. TURN VIRTUAL EVENTS INTO MEASURABLE PIPELINE

Virtual events are a growth channel, not a broadcast tool. You own the connection between attendance and revenue.

 - Build lead capture and qualification workflows for every virtual event, coordinated with the global events reporting engine

 - Partner with AEs on pre-event targeting, personalised invitations, and post-event follow-up sequences

 - Track and report the metrics that matter: registrations, attendance rate, MQLs generated, pipeline influenced, and deals touched

 - Run post-event debriefs tha

source_jobs.title: Research Impact Lead - NYC
source_jobs.description:
Be the face of Conveo to the world's best brands — and make them wildly successful.




WHAT WE ARE BUILDING AT CONVEO

Conveo is the AI research platform enabling fast, affordable, and high-quality consumer / B2B research. Global brands like Unilever, Google, and P&G use our AI video interviewer to generate insights across marketing and product teams.




#1 WHAT PROBLEM ARE WE SOLVING, AND WHY IS THIS AN IMPORTANT PROBLEM TO SOLVE

The current/traditional research methods companies rely on are slow, expensive, and superficial. Running great research also requires expertise, which is a blocker to many companies. That directly affects how well companies understand their customers and how well they can serve them. Conveo is the platform that closes this gap by enabling affordable, scaled, and deep insights in days instead of weeks.




#2 THE TEAM YOU WILL JOIN

You will join an extremely talented team of incredibly passionate, high-energy people. We go the extra mile while having the best time of our lives. Our team has the combination of decades of market research knowledge, incredible engineering ability, and experience building companies.




#3 HOW WE OPERATE

 - We truly care about our clients and the problem we solve. That means we humbly go the extra mile every time.

 - We work hard, and we have fun.

 - To keep our quality bar incredibly high, we want to execute with the smallest possible team.




THE ROLE

You are the face of Conveo to our enterprise clients. Your mission is to make them wildly successful — not by doing work for them, but by making them capable on the platform. You drive autonomy, expansion, and advocacy.

This is not a reactive support role. You're a growth driver. You own the full client lifecycle from onboarding through expansion, and you help build the Customer Growth function as we scale. The clients you work with are global brands with complex organizations — and your job is to turn them into Conveo power users and champions.




YOUR MISSION

 1. Own a portfolio of enterprise accounts from onboarding through expansion

 2. Run world-class onboarding — use case mapping, stakeholder training, and first-project coaching

 3. Drive adoption across the client organization — activate individual users and create internal champions

 4. Build deep relationships with senior stakeholders at the VP/SVP level

 5. Travel to clients regularly — in-person is how real trust gets built

 6. Generate advocacy — testimonials, references, and introductions to peers at other companies

 7. Partner with sales to identify and drive expansion opportunities within your accounts




WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR

 - 1–5 years of experience in consulting, SaaS customer success, account management, or a similar client-facing role

 - Outgoing and energetic — you thrive in front of clients and build trust quickly

 - You think in business outcomes, not feature checklists

 - Intense — fire in the eyes. You care deeply about making clients successful.

 - Research experience is a plus, but not a requirement

 - Willingness to travel to clients — this is a relationship-first role




LOCATION

New York. Client travel expected.




WHY JOIN US

At Conveo, you'll join a team that genuinely enjoys working and spending time together. We care about building real relationships, not just great products. That's why we run quarterly team off-sites where we disconnect, reset, and have fun.

 - Own a high-impact role at a hyper-growth, YC-backed AI company

 - Direct access to founders and senior leadership

 - Work with world-class enterprise clients (Unilever, Google, P&G, Canva, and more)

 - Competitive compensation, including meaningful equity (stock options) with real upside

 - Hybrid working model with offices in London, Antwerp, and New York

 - A culture built on taste, speed, ownership, and ambition

source_jobs.title: Social Media Lead
source_jobs.description:
WHAT WE'RE BUILDING AT CONVEO

Conveo is the AI research platform enabling fast, affordable, and high-quality consumer and B2B research. Global brands like Unilever, Google, and Orange use our AI video interviewer across insights, marketing, and product teams.

We're going from $1M to $100M ARR in under two years. Marketing is one of the engines that gets us there. Social is where we make Conveo unmissable.



THE ROLE

As our Social Media Lead, you own attention for Conveo. That breaks into three things:

1. The system. You own our social calendar end-to-end. You coordinate launches with PMM, events, customer marketing, and sales so every product release, customer win, event, and research moment lands as planned. You design the automation pipeline that turns customer calls, studies, and product updates into 25+ posts per week without burning anyone out. By Q4, the engine runs at 70% automated, and the work that's left is creative taste, not recurring toil.

2. The voices. You operate the personal accounts of our CEO, CPO, Head of Research, and 6+ supporting voices across the company. You shape each one into a distinct, recognizable industry voice. Niels does not sound like Dieter. Hendrik writes nothing like Charles. You make sure that's true. Today these accounts have ~80K combined followers. By end of year, they have 170K+, without flattening any of them into corporate mush.

3. The moments. You hunt and engineer the breakout posts that drag Conveo into the AI conversation. These are the posts that escape our immediate network and hit broader timelines. You create some, you direct others, and you know the difference between bold and embarrassing.



WHAT THIS ROLE IS NOT

This is not brand babysitting.

This is not "stay on message" social.

This is also not a pure creator role.

You are a systems-thinking content operator who can also ship sharp creative work. Not a creator who tolerates ops on the side. The visible 10% of this job is the breakout viral post. The invisible 90% is the calendar architecture, the multi-voice ghostwriting, and the coordination across a marketing team that grew from 2 to 15 people in three months.

If you want to be a TikTok-native creator with a personal brand to build, this is the wrong job. If you want to build the distribution engine that turns a generational AI company into a category-defining one, keep reading.



YOUR MISSION



1. RUN THE EDITORIAL SYSTEM

 - Own the editorial calendar end-to-end across Conveo's company accounts, founder accounts, and supporting voices.

 - Design the content hierarchy. Decide what gets which weight, when.

 - Coordinate with PMM, Events, Customer Marketing, and Product so launches, customer wins, and event amplification land on cadence.

 - Move us from inconsistent posting to 3 to 5 company posts plus 25 to 40 thought leadership posts per week, on cadence, on brand, by Q4.


2. SHAPE VOICES, NOT JUST POSTS

 - Ghostwrite and operate the personal accounts of Dieter (CEO), Hendrik (CPO), Niels (Head of Research), and our supporting voice network of 6+ operators.

 - Build a distinct point of view for each voice. Map their expertise, their pet topics, their tone, their cadence.

 - Stand up the operating system behind it: source extraction, draft generation, voice review, scheduling, engagement loops.


3. USE AI TO MULTIPLY, NOT SUBSTITUTE

 - Aggressively automate every repeatable part of the pipeline. Aim for 70%+ zero-effort production by Q4.

 - Never ship content that feels AI-generated. AI removes friction, not thinking.

 - Build prompt systems, scheduled tasks, and content workflows that your replacement could pick up and run.


4. ENGINEER VIRAL MOMENTS

 - Constantly hunt for trends, product launches, industry shifts, and cultural beats worth hijacking.

 - Turn complex AI and research ideas into simple, sharp, opinionated takes.

 - Engineer virality through hooks, framing, speed, and repetition. Not hope.


5. OPERATE LIKE AN OWNER

 - Treat

source_jobs.title: Business Development Representative (BDR) - London
source_jobs.description:
WHAT WE ARE BUILDING AT CONVEO

Conveo is the AI research platform enabling fast, affordable, and high-quality consumer / B2B research. Global brands like Unilever, Google, and Orange use our AI video interviewer to generate insights across marketing and product teams.




#1 WHAT PROBLEM ARE WE SOLVING, AND WHY IS THIS AN IMPORTANT PROBLEM TO SOLVE

The current/traditional research methods companies rely on are slow, expensive, and superficial. Running great research also requires expertise, which is a blocker to many companies. That directly affects how well companies understand their customers and how well they can serve them.





#2 THE TEAM YOU WILL JOIN

You will join an extremely talented team of incredibly passionate, high-energy people. We go the extra mile while having the best time of our lives. Our team has the combination of decades of market research knowledge, incredible engineering ability, and experience building companies.




#3 HOW WE OPERATE

 - We truly care about our clients and the problem we solve. That means we humbly go the extra mile every time.

 - We work hard, and we have fun.

 - To keep our quality bar incredibly high, we want to execute with the smallest possible team.




ABOUT THE ROLE

We’re looking for a highly driven Business Development Representative (BDR) to help build and scale pipeline generation at Conveo.

This is primarily an outbound-focused role. You will be responsible for identifying the right accounts and stakeholders, building targeted prospect lists, creating thoughtful outbound campaigns and messaging, and turning market interest into qualified meetings.

You will work closely with sales and marketing to ensure our outbound motion is relevant, timely, and commercially effective whether that is through cold outreach, event follow up, webinar campaigns, re engagement sequences, or trigger based prospecting. Additionally, you’ll serve as a brand ambassador for Conveo at international events to identify and nurture new lead opportunities.

While you may support selected inbound qualification where needed, the core focus of the role is on proactive outbounding and campaign execution.




WHAT YOU’LL DO




OWN OUTBOUND PROSPECTING AND CAMPAIGN EXECUTION

 - Build and run outbound campaigns across target accounts, verticals, and buyer personas

 - Research companies and identify the most relevant stakeholders to engage

 - Create high-quality outreach copy tailored by role, industry, use case, and trigger

 - Develop messaging that is concise, commercial, and relevant rather than generic

 - Execute outreach across email, LinkedIn, sequencing tools, and other relevant channels

 - Represent Conveo at events around the world to identify and nurture new leads


BUILD TARGETED LISTS AND PROSPECTING MOTIONS

 - Create and maintain high-quality account and contact lists aligned to our ICP

 - Segment prospects by role, function, industry, geography, and priority use case

 - Support account prioritisation and stakeholder mapping for strategic opportunities

 - Launch targeted campaigns around new product launches, content, case studies, funding events, hiring activity, market shifts, and other commercial triggers


OWN FOLLOW-UP FROM EVENTS AND DEMAND GENERATION ACTIVITY

 - Attend relevant events, conferences, and webinars where appropriate

 - Manage structured follow-up for leads generated through events, field marketing, and content activity

 - Ensure warm prospects are engaged quickly and effectively after every event or campaign

 - Turn interest and awareness into qualified meetings and next steps for the sales team


SUPPORT PIPELINE CREATION AND REACTIVATION

 - Re-engage dormant leads and previously active opportunities

 - Work stale pipeline systematically to surface new demand

 - Identify where prospects have gone cold and build smart follow-up campaigns to bring them back into conversation

 - Help ensure no high-potential account is left untouched

source_jobs.title: Learning & Development Lead
source_jobs.description:
WHAT WE ARE BUILDING AT CONVEO

Conveo is the AI research platform enabling fast, affordable, and high-quality consumer / B2B research. Global brands use our AI video interviewer to generate insights across marketing, product, and research teams.







#1 WHAT PROBLEM ARE WE SOLVING AND WHY IS THIS AN IMPORTANT PROBLEM TO SOLVE

The traditional research methods companies rely on are slow, expensive, and superficial. Running great research requires expertise that most companies do not have. That directly affects how well businesses understand their customers and how well they can serve them.




#2 THE TEAM YOU WILL JOIN

You will join an extremely talented team of incredibly passionate, high-energy people. We go the extra mile while having the best time of our lives. Our team combines decades of market research knowledge, world-class engineering, and experience building companies.




#3 HOW WE OPERATE

 - We truly care about our clients and the problem we solve. We humbly go the extra mile every time.

 - We work hard and we have fun.

 - To keep our quality bar incredibly high, we want to execute with the smallest possible team.
   
   


ABOUT THE ROLE

Conveo is growing from 20 to 170 people in 12 months. That is 10-15 new hires every month. At the same time, the product ships major updates every 1-2 weeks, and the company's positioning is evolving from "research platform" to "compounding customer intelligence layer."

That combination is dangerous if nobody owns it.


If we do this badly, new hires take 3 months to become useful, tenured team members lose track of what the product actually does, and sales shows up to Fortune 500 meetings with last quarter's story. If we do this well, every new hire is impactful inside 30 days, the whole company understands the product and the positioning in real time, and Conveo keeps the quality bar of a 20-person team at 170 people.


That is your job.


As our Learning & Development Lead, you will own how Conveo learns, at the speed Conveo ships. You will design, run, and constantly rebuild the two learning systems that matter most right now:

 1. Onboarding: how every new Conveo hire goes from "first day" to "fully productive" fast, consistently, and with a quality bar

 2. Continuous enablement: how every existing team member stays current as product, positioning, and company evolve

You are not building a traditional L&D function. You are building a modern, AI-powered, just-in-time learning system for a company that is literally changing under its own feet.


THIS ROLE SITS AT THE INTERSECTION OF:

 - Hypergrowth onboarding: the gateway every new hire passes through

 - Product and positioning enablement: the loop that keeps the whole org current

 - Operational excellence: systems and measurement, not "nice to have" workshops

 - Culture scaling: keeping Conveo's ambition, taste, and quality bar intact at 5x the team size



This role is only for someone who sees L&D as the operating system of a fast-scaling company, not a cost center.




YOUR MISSION




BUILD THE WORLD-CLASS CONVEO ONBOARDING

You own how every new Conveo hire starts:

 - A consistent, scalable pre-start + first-30-days + first-90-days program, customized per function (Engineering, Product, GTM, CS, Ops)

 - A clear definition of "fully productive" for each role, and the path to get there

 - Onboarding content that is AI-powered, self-serve, and constantly fresh

 - A buddy, mentor, and manager playbook so the experience doesn't depend on who your manager happens to be

 - A feedback loop that catches failing onboarding in week 1, not week 12

Your bar: every new hire is making real contributions inside 30 days, and says their onboarding was the best they've ever had.




KEEP THE WHOLE COMPANY CURRENT ON PRODUCT AND POSITIONING

The product ships major changes every 1-2 weeks. Positioning evolves every quarter. You build the enablement engine that keeps 150 people current without burning everyone out:

 - A w

source_jobs.title: GTM Associate - Internship
source_jobs.description:
Conveo is the AI research platform enabling fast, affordable, and high quality consumer / B2B research. Global brands like Unilever, Google, and Orange use our AI video interviewer across insights, marketing, and product teams.




THE PROBLEM

The current/traditional research methods companies rely on are slow, expensive, and superficial. Running great research also requires expertise which is a blocker to many companies. That directly affects how well companies understand their customers and how well they can serve them.




THE TEAM

You will join an extremely talented team of incredibly passionate, high-energy people. We go the extra mile while having the best time of our lives. Our team has the combination of decades of market research knowledge, incredible engineering ability, and experience building companies.




HOW WE OPERATE

- We truly care about our clients and the problem we solve. That means we humbly go the extra mile every time.

- We work hard and we have fun.

- To keep our quality bar incredibly high, we want to execute with the smallest possible team.




THE ROLE

As a Go-to-Market Associate Intern, you'll be embedded in the GTM team as a true generalist operator. You'll work across marketing, sales enablement and customer success, owning initiatives end-to-end, not just filling in spreadsheets. One week you might be writing a case study with a Unilever champion. The next, you're building a competitive battlecard, coordinating a webinar, or helping craft the pitch for a new vertical.



This is for someone who wants to understand how a startup actually grows. Not in theory, but by doing the work.




WHAT YOU'LL DO

1. Create customer-facing content. Write case studies, one-pagers, customer stories, and sales collateral grounded in real outcomes. Sharp narratives, real data, zero fluff.

2. Support sales enablement. Build battlecards, competitive comparisons, vertical-specific messaging, and demo prep materials that help the sales team win.

4. Build customer proof. Work directly with customers to capture testimonials, quotes, success stories, and reference materials. Organize them so the whole GTM team can use them.

5. Research markets and competitors. Map new verticals, analyze competitor positioning, identify ICP patterns, and surface insights that sharpen our strategy.

6. Support events and community. Help plan and execute customer dinners, webinars, conference presence, and community activations.




WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR

Non-negotiables

- Currently pursuing a university degree in Business, management, engineering or any other relevant degrees

- High agency. You don't wait for a task list; you see what needs doing and do it.

- Comfortable talking to customers and senior stakeholders

- Strong organizational skills. You can juggle multiple initiatives without dropping balls.

- Extremely strong writing skills. You can tell a story that people actually want to read.

- Strong written and verbal English communication



Bonus (not required)

- Experience creating marketing content (blog posts, case studies, social, decks)

- Familiarity with B2B SaaS, market research, or enterprise sales

- Light design skills (Canva, Figma, or similar)

- Experience with HubSpot or CRM tools

- Event coordination experience




MINDSET

- You're a generalist who gets things done, not a specialist who waits for the right task

- Ownership over everything you touch

- Pragmatic: you know when something needs polish and when rough-and-fast is better

- Great taste. You care about quality without being a perfectionist.

- Low ego, high output

- Comfortable with ambiguity; you thrive in fast-moving environments




WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE

- You've shipped content and assets the GTM team actually uses daily

- Customers know your name. You've built real relationships, not transactional ones.

- You understand how marketing, sales, and customer success work together to grow a company

- The team says: "This would not

You will work closely with sales and marketing to ensure our outbound motion is relevant, timely, and commercially effective whether that is through cold outreach, event follow up, webinar campaigns, re engagement sequences, or trigger based prospecting. Additionally, you’ll serve as a brand ambassador for Conveo at international events to identify and nurture new lead opportunities.

While you may support selected inbound qualification where needed, the core focus of the role is on proactive outbounding and campaign execution.

OWN OUTBOUND PROSPECTING AND CAMPAIGN EXECUTION

source_jobs.title: Senior Full-Stack Engineer (React/Typescript)
source_jobs.description:
WHAT WE ARE BUILDING AT CONVEO

Conveo is the AI research platform enabling fast, affordable, and high quality consumer / B2B research. Global brands like Unilever, Google, and Orange use our AI video interviewer to generate insights across marketing, and product teams.

This role can sit in either our London or Antwerp office.




#1 WHAT PROBLEM ARE WE SOLVING AND WHY IS THIS AN IMPORTANT PROBLEM TO SOLVE


The current/traditional research methods companies rely on are slow, expensive, and superficial. Running great research also requires expertise which is a blocker to many companies. That directly affects how well companies understand their customers and how well they can serve them.




#2 THE TEAM YOU WILL JOIN


You will join an extremely talented team of incredibly passionate, high-energy people. We go the extra mile while having the best time of our lives. Our team has the combination of decades of market research knowledge, incredible engineering ability, and experience building companies.




#3 HOW WE OPERATE

 - We truly care about our clients and the problem we solve. That means we humbly go the extra mile every time.

 - Our engineering team talks directly with our customers. No layers in between.

 - We work hard and we have fun.

 - To keep our quality bar incredibly high, we want to execute with the smallest possible team.
   
   


THE ROLE


As a Senior Full-Stack Engineer at Conveo, you'll spearhead the development lifecycle for the AI-powered platform, taking ownership of features from initial specifications through deployment. You'll build applications where AI is seamlessly integrated as core technology, not just an add-on feature. You'll stay at the cutting edge of AI capabilities.
A big part of your role will involve direct contact with our customers. Since we have no product managers, you'll be responsible for directly interfacing with clients, understanding their needs, and translating those into technical solutions. This customer-facing aspect is crucial for ensuring we build exactly what solves their problems.
Beyond coding, you'll actively participate in product refinement and brainstorming sessions, directly influencing both what we build and how we build it, making this an opportunity to have significant technical and strategic impact.




WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR


 - 6+ years of experience building full-stack applications with TypeScript and Node.js.

 - Strong backend experience: designing APIs, working with PostgreSQL, and managing background jobs and async workflows.

 - Solid frontend skills with React. Experience with React Router v7 or Remix is a plus.

 - Experience with cloud infrastructure (AWS and/or GCP) — you're comfortable with services like S3, media pipelines, and deployment tooling.

 - Experience building AI-driven applications (e.g. prompt engineering, working with LLM APIs, and/or fine-tuning experience are a plus).

 - Can independently lead projects from concept to launch.

 - Excellent written and verbal communication skills in English with a keen eye for detail.

 - A collaborative mindset, able to work autonomously in a small, fast-paced team.
   


WHY JOIN US?

 - Ship alongside engineers who've built and scaled products used by millions.

 - Work directly with frontier AI models and push what they can actually do.

 - Join a YC-backed team that's growing fast and gives you room to grow with it.

 - Competitive salary and meaningful equity. We want you to own a real piece of what we're building.

 - Offices in London, Antwerp, and New York. We work best together, so we ask for 3 days a week in the office.

 - We help cover your commute, because getting here should be the easy part.

 - Regular socials: rooftop drinks, team dinners, run clubs, and more.

 - Twice-yearly off-sites to places worth travelling to. Austria, Las Vegas, and Portugal coming up. 🥳

 - Private health coverage.

 - Enhanced employer pension contribution.

 - Refer someone great and earn up to $5,0

source_jobs.title: Research Ops Associate
source_jobs.description:
What we are building at Conveo

Conveo is the AI research platform enabling fast, affordable, and high-quality consumer and B2B research. Global brands like Unilever, Google, and Apple use our AI video interviewer to generate insights across marketing and product teams.

#1 What problem are we solving, and why does this matter

The current research methods companies rely on are slow, expensive, and superficial. Running great research also requires expertise, which is a blocker to many companies. That directly affects how well companies understand their customers — and how well they can serve them. We're fixing that. But great technology alone isn't enough. Behind every well-run study is someone making sure things actually happen. That's where you come in.

#2 The team you will join

You will join an extremely talented team of incredibly passionate, high-energy people. We go the extra mile while having the best time of our lives. Our team combines decades of market research knowledge, incredible engineering ability, and experience building companies. You'll sit within the research team, working closely with Research Insight Leads and Client Success to keep projects running smoothly.

#3 How we operate

We truly care about our clients and the problem we solve. That means we humbly go the extra mile every time.

We work hard, and we have fun.

To keep our quality bar incredibly high, we want to execute with the smallest possible team.

The Role

As a Research Ops Associate at Conveo, you will be the operational backbone of our research projects. Your job is to make sure studies run on time, participants are recruited, and guides are checked - so nothing falls through the cracks.

This is not a passive coordination role. We're looking for someone who is self-motivated, figures things out independently, and gets things done without needing constant direction. You will own day-to-day delivery and support senior researchers and client success managers, building the operational habits that make great research repeatable. The best people in this role will grow into Research or Client Success functions over time.

Your Mission

Manage participant recruitment end-to-end

 - Coordinate recruitment across panel providers to ensure the right participants are sourced for each study

 - Monitor recruitment progress, track quotas, and flag issues early - including slow recruitment, quality concerns, or participant drop-off

 - Review participant interviews for quality and fraud signals, ensuring only valid responses are counted

 - Liaise with panel partners to troubleshoot issues and keep studies on track

Keep study quality high

 - Review and quality-check discussion guides before studies go live, making sure they're accurate, well-structured, and ready for participants

 - Complete quality assurance tasks across active projects, catching errors before they become problems

 - Support Research Insight Leads in maintaining the high standard Conveo is known for

Keep operations running smoothly

 - Track project status accurately across multiple live studies at once

 - Communicate clearly and proactively within the team — raising risks early and keeping everyone informed

 - Build and maintain good operational habits that make processes faster and more reliable over time

What we are looking for

Non-negotiables

 - A proven self-starter — show us something you taught yourself, built, or figured out on your own

 - Smart, determined, and ready to roll your sleeves up

 - Highly organised with exceptional attention to detail

 - Strong communicator — clear, concise, and proactive

 - Comfortable working at pace in a fast-moving startup environment

 - Some experience or genuine interest in market research, consumer insights, or UX research

Mindset

 - Self-motivated — you don't need chasing, you need space

 - Ownership, not excuses

 - Detail-oriented but never slow

 - Low ego, high standards

 - Excited by AI and what it means for researc

source_jobs.title: Staff Product Designer
source_jobs.description:
WHAT WE ARE BUILDING AT CONVEO

Conveo is the AI research platform enabling fast, affordable, and high quality consumer / B2B research. Global brands like Unilever, Google, and Orange use our AI video interviewer to across insights, marketing, and product teams.

This role can sit in either our London or Antwerp office.



We’re looking for our first senior design hire — a Staff Product Designer who will own product design end-to-end and help define how AI-native research tools should feel. This is a rare opportunity to shape an entire product category from the ground up.

One thing worth knowing upfront: we don't have dedicated product managers. Product thinking is a shared discipline here — engineers talk directly to customers, and you'll be right in that mix. If that excites you more than it scares you, read on.

You’ll work directly with the founders, the engineering team, and customers to craft thoughtful, intuitive experiences that make complex workflows feel simple, clear, and delightful.



WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Deliver high-quality, user-centered designs that evolve Conveo’s core product surfaces and elevate the overall experience.

 - Design, prototype, and test new AI-powered workflows — from interview setup to insight synthesis — making complicated research feel effortless.

 - Shape the future of AI-assisted research tools, exploring new interaction models beyond current SaaS patterns.

 - Turn ambiguous, high-impact problems into concrete products — from early vision, to roadmap, to launch.

 - Collaborate closely with engineering, product, and leadership to define both long-term strategy and near-term execution.

 - Craft high-quality UI and interaction design that sets the bar for design excellence at Conveo.

 - Lead design reviews and contribute to a strong culture of feedback, iteration, and craft.

 - Help establish the foundations of our design system, processes, and product design culture as our first designer.
   


MINIMUM REQUIREMENTS

 - 8+ years of relevant product design experience at a product-driven tech company or high-velocity startup.

 - A portfolio demonstrating strong design fundamentals, polished UI craft, and thoughtful end-to-end product thinking.

 - Experience partnering closely with cross-functional teams to shape product direction.

 - Ability to balance user needs, business goals, and multiple stakeholder inputs.

 - Skilled at communicating design decisions clearly and persuasively across disciplines.

 - Strong ability to influence product strategy and raise the design bar across the company.

 - Comfortable presenting work to company leadership through a clear and compelling story.

 - Experience working on ambiguous, complex problems spanning multiple product areas.
   


PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS

 - Excitement about designing for AI-native products and strong opinions about what makes a great AI experience.

 - Experience designing tools for technical or expert users (researchers, analysts, builders, etc.).

 - Comfort prototyping quickly — whether in Figma, code, or with AI tools — and leading through experimentation.

 - Ability to craft and advocate for new design patterns and interaction models beyond existing design systems.

 - Startup experience (or a strong desire to build in a small, fast-moving team).

 - Passion for helping others grow and raising design maturity across the organization.
   


WHY THIS ROLE IS SPECIAL

This is not a “slot into an org chart” design role.

As Conveo’s first designer, you will:

 - Define the product design function from scratch

 - Shape how AI and humans collaborate in research

 - Build experiences that feel trustworthy, elegant, and deeply human

 - Have direct influence over the company’s direction and taste
   


WHY JOIN US?

 - Work with the latest AI models at the cutting edge of what's possible.

 - Work at a hyper-growth, Y Combinator-backed startup where speed and impact matter.

 - Collaborate with a team that is obsessed with

source_jobs.title: Head of Sales - West Coast
source_jobs.description:
WHAT WE ARE BUILDING AT CONVEO

Conveo is the AI research platform enabling fast, affordable, and high-quality consumer / B2B research. Global brands like Unilever, Google, and Orange use our AI video interviewer to generate insights across marketing and product teams.




#1 WHAT PROBLEM ARE WE SOLVING, AND WHY IS THIS AN IMPORTANT PROBLEM TO SOLVE

The current/traditional research methods companies rely on are slow, expensive, and superficial. Running great research also requires expertise, which is a blocker to many companies. That directly affects how well companies understand their customers and how well they can serve them.




#2 THE TEAM YOU WILL JOIN

You will join an extremely talented team of incredibly passionate, high-energy people. We go the extra mile while having the best time of our lives. Our team has the combination of decades of market research knowledge, incredible engineering ability, and experience building companies.




#3 HOW WE OPERATE

 - We truly care about our clients and the problem we solve. That means we humbly go the extra mile every time.

 - We work hard, and we have fun.

 - To keep our quality bar incredibly high, we want to execute with the smallest possible team.




THE ROLE

We're looking for a highly driven Head of Sales to help scale revenue at Conveo by leading from the front.

This is a player coach role. You will lead our West Coast team of ~5 Account Executives while carrying your own individual quota. You'll be responsible for the performance, development, and commercial output of the team, and at the same time you'll be running your own strategic deals and showing the team what great looks like in practice.

You will report directly to the Global VP of Sales and work closely with marketing, BDR, and customer success to ensure the team is converting pipeline efficiently, executing consistently, and landing the kind of customers that compound our growth.

This is not a role for someone who wants to step back from selling. The best person for this job loves closing deals, loves coaching reps, and refuses to choose between the two.




YOUR MISSION


1. LEAD A HIGH-PERFORMING TEAM OF 5 ACCOUNT EXECUTIVES

 - Own the performance, quota attainment, and development of ~5 AEs

 - Run a high quality weekly operating cadence including 1:1s, pipeline reviews, forecast calls, and deal reviews

 - Coach reps on discovery, qualification, multi threading, commercial framing, negotiation, and closing

 - Set a high bar for activity, preparation, and commercial discipline across the team

 - Identify performance gaps quickly and act on them with clear feedback and concrete plans

 - Help recruit, onboard, and ramp new AEs as the team grows
   
   


2. CARRY AND DELIVER YOUR OWN INDIVIDUAL QUOTA

 - Own and close a portfolio of strategic accounts alongside your management responsibilities

 - Run full cycle sales from discovery through to commercial close on enterprise opportunities

 - Use your own deals to model best practice for the team rather than managing from the sideline

 - Stay close to the product, the market, and the buyer so your instincts and the team's stay sharp
   
   


3. DRIVE FORECAST ACCURACY AND COMMERCIAL DISCIPLINE

 - Own the team's forecast and be accountable for its accuracy to the VP of Sales

 - Inspect pipeline rigorously and make sure deals are qualified, multi-threaded, and progressing

 - Hold the team to a clear standard on CRM hygiene, MEDDICC (or equivalent), and deal documentation

 - Surface risk early and intervene on critical deals before they slip
   
   


4. IMPROVE HOW THE TEAM SELLS

 - Identify what is and isn't working in the team's motion and fix it quickly

 - Refine playbooks, talk tracks, objection handling, and competitive positioning with the team

 - Partner with marketing and BDR to make sure pipeline coverage and quality are where they need to be

 - Feed insights from the field back into product, pricing, and packaging conversations

source_jobs.title: Agency Growth Lead
source_jobs.description:
Own the full commercial lifecycle of Conveo's Agency Vertical — from first demo to account expansion — and build the playbook that turns research agencies into power users of AI-driven research and a flywheel for end-client engagement.




WHAT WE ARE BUILDING AT CONVEO




Conveo is the AI research platform enabling fast, affordable, and high-quality consumer / B2B research. Global brands like Unilever, Google, and Ipsos use our AI video interviewer to generate insights across marketing and product teams.




#1 WHAT PROBLEM ARE WE SOLVING, AND WHY IS THIS AN IMPORTANT PROBLEM TO SOLVE

The current/traditional research methods companies rely on are slow, expensive, and superficial. Running great research also requires expertise, which is a blocker to many companies. That directly affects how well companies understand their customers and how well they can serve them. Conveo is the platform that closes this gap by enabling affordable, scaled, and deep insights in days instead of weeks.




#2 THE TEAM YOU WILL JOIN

You will join an extremely talented team of incredibly passionate, high-energy people. We go the extra mile while having the best time of our lives. Our team has the combination of decades of market research knowledge, incredible engineering ability, and experience building companies.




#3 HOW WE OPERATE

 - We truly care about our clients and the problem we solve. That means we humbly go the extra mile every time.

 - We work hard, and we have fun.

 - To keep our quality bar incredibly high, we want to execute with the smallest possible team.




THE ROLE

Conveo's agency vertical has grown from a self-serve side-channel to a serious revenue line — six figure revenue in March alone, double digit active agency accounts, and a pipeline that includes the biggest players in the agency business. The vertical is targeting 7-figure turnover in 2026 and needs its first dedicated growth hire to keep up with the momentum.



You'll report directly to Anton (who built the agency vertical from scratch) and join a small, high-output team. This is not a siloed SDR or CSM role — you'll run the full lifecycle: sourcing and closing new agency accounts, onboarding them onto the platform, driving adoption, and expanding usage across their researcher teams. You'll work with agencies ranging from boutique research firms to global holding companies.



The day-to-day is fast-paced, varied, and commercial. One hour you're running a discovery call with a global agency exploring AI research tools; the next you're helping a power user set up a complex multi-market study; the next you're building an outbound sequence targeting the top 50 research agencies globally. This role suits someone who thrives in ambiguity, moves fast, and gets energy from wearing multiple hats in a high-growth environment.




THIS IS A HIGH-LEVERAGE ROLE IN WHICH YOU WILL:

 - Own new agency sales end-to-end — from first touch to signed account

 - Onboard new agencies and get them to first value (first completed study) within days

 - Manage and expand a growing book of agency accounts, driving platform adoption and usage

 - Build and refine the agency sales and CS playbook that the team will scale on

 - Be the voice of the agency customer internally — feeding product, marketing, and engineering with what agencies actually need




YOUR MISSION




1. DRIVE NEW AGENCY REVENUE THROUGH OUTBOUND AND INBOUND SALES

 - Own the full agency sales cycle: prospecting, discovery, demo, close

 - Run demos that show agencies how Conveo transforms their research delivery (faster, cheaper, better qual)

 - Manage vendor onboarding processes for larger agencies (WPP, Omnicom-level procurement)

 - Consistently grow the agency customer base through a mix of inbound and outbound motions




2. ONBOARD NEW AGENCIES AND GET THEM TO FIRST VALUE FAST

 - Run onboarding calls and first-study support for new sign-ups

 - Provide training on the platform, study design, and AI modera

source_jobs.title: Client Growth Manager - UK/Europe
source_jobs.description:
BE THE FACE OF CONVEO TO THE WORLD'S BEST BRANDS — AND MAKE THEM WILDLY SUCCESSFUL.





WHAT WE ARE BUILDING AT CONVEO

Conveo is the AI research platform enabling fast, affordable, and high-quality consumer / B2B research. Global brands like Unilever, Google, and P&G use our AI video interviewer to generate insights across marketing and product teams.




#1 WHAT PROBLEM ARE WE SOLVING, AND WHY IS THIS AN IMPORTANT PROBLEM TO SOLVE

The current/traditional research methods companies rely on are slow, expensive, and superficial. Running great research also requires expertise, which is a blocker to many companies. That directly affects how well companies understand their customers and how well they can serve them. Conveo is the platform that closes this gap by enabling affordable, scaled, and deep insights in days instead of weeks.




#2 THE TEAM YOU WILL JOIN

You will join an extremely talented team of incredibly passionate, high-energy people. We go the extra mile while having the best time of our lives. Our team has the combination of decades of market research knowledge, incredible engineering ability, and experience building companies.




#3 HOW WE OPERATE

 - We truly care about our clients and the problem we solve. That means we humbly go the extra mile every time.

 - We work hard, and we have fun.

 - To keep our quality bar incredibly high, we want to execute with the smallest possible team.




THE ROLE

You are the face of Conveo to our enterprise clients. Your mission is to make them wildly successful — not by doing work for them, but by making them capable on the platform. You drive autonomy, expansion, and advocacy.

This is not a reactive support role. You're a growth driver. You own the full client lifecycle from onboarding through expansion, and you help build the Customer Growth function as we scale. The clients you work with are global brands with complex organizations — and your job is to turn them into Conveo power users and champions.




YOUR MISSION

 1. Own a portfolio of enterprise accounts from onboarding through expansion

 2. Run world-class onboarding — use case mapping, stakeholder training, and first-project coaching

 3. Drive adoption across the client organization — activate individual users and create internal champions

 4. Build deep relationships with senior stakeholders at the VP/SVP level

 5. Travel to clients regularly — in-person is how real trust gets built

 6. Generate advocacy — testimonials, references, and introductions to peers at other companies

 7. Partner with sales to identify and drive expansion opportunities within your accounts




WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR

 - 1–5 years of experience in consulting, SaaS customer success, account management, or a similar client-facing role

 - Outgoing and energetic — you thrive in front of clients and build trust quickly

 - You think in business outcomes, not feature checklists

 - Intense — fire in the eyes. You care deeply about making clients successful.

 - Research experience is a plus, but not a requirement

 - Willingness to travel to clients — this is a relationship-first role




LOCATION

London or Antwerp. Client travel expected.




WHY JOIN US

At Conveo, you'll join a team that genuinely enjoys working and spending time together. We care about building real relationships, not just great products. That's why we run quarterly team off-sites where we disconnect, reset, and have fun.

 - Own a high-impact role at a hyper-growth, YC-backed AI company

 - Direct access to founders and senior leadership

 - Work with world-class enterprise clients (Unilever, Google, P&G, Canva, and more)

 - Competitive compensation, including meaningful equity (stock options) with real upside

 - Hybrid working model with offices in London, Antwerp, and New York

 - A culture built on taste, speed, ownership, and ambition

notes: High volume of sales and business development roles, with some tech and design roles. No explicit mention of sponsorship or clearance requirements.
